---
title: "Shapley-Mahalanobis Outlier Experiments"
output:
  html_notebook:
    toc: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.width = 7,
  fig.height = 4
)

root <- if (file.exists(file.path("R", "load.R"))) "." else ".."
root <- normalizePath(root)

source(file.path(root, "R", "load.R"))
source_project(root)

missing <- check_packages(c("ShapleyOutlier"))
if (length(missing) > 0) {
  stop(
    "Missing required package(s): ",
    paste(missing, collapse = ", "),
    ". Run `Rscript scripts/install_packages.R` first."
  )
}
```

## Purpose

This notebook is the thesis-facing layer. The implementation lives in `R/`, while this document defines the experiment, presents the outputs, and records interpretation.

## Simulated Data

```{r simulate}
sim <- simulate_shapley_experiment(
  n = 150,
  p = 6,
  rho = 0.55,
  row_fraction = 0.06,
  cell_fraction = 0.03,
  magnitude = 6,
  seed = 2026
)

dim(sim$x)
sum(sim$truth$row_outlier)
sum(sim$truth$cell_outlier)
```

## Original Method

```{r original-method}
original <- run_shapley_original(
  sim$x,
  estimator = "classical",
  q = 0.99,
  method_label = "Original: classical covariance"
)

original
```

```{r original-plots}
plot_md_scores(original)
plot_observation_contributions(original)
plot_shapley_heatmap(original)
```

## Extension Methods

```{r robust-extension}
results <- list(original_classical = original)

if (requireNamespace("robustbase", quietly = TRUE)) {
  results$extension_mcd <- run_robust_shapley(
    sim$x,
    estimator = "mcd",
    q = 0.99,
    method_label = "Extension: robust MCD covariance"
  )

  results$extension_ogk <- run_robust_shapley(
    sim$x,
    estimator = "ogk",
    q = 0.99,
    method_label = "Extension: robust OGK covariance"
  )
}

lapply(results, print)
```

```{r interaction-extension}
interaction <- run_interaction_extension(sim$x, estimator = "classical")
interaction$observation
round(interaction$interaction, 3)
```

```{r grouped-contributions}
groups <- c(V1 = "group_a", V2 = "group_a", V3 = "group_b", V4 = "group_b", V5 = "group_c", V6 = "group_c")
group_phi <- summarise_group_contributions(original$phi, groups)
head(group_phi)
```

## Evaluation

```{r evaluation}
metrics <- compare_methods(results, sim$truth)
metrics
```

```{r evaluation-plots}
plot_method_comparison(metrics, metric = "f1", scope = "row")
plot_method_comparison(metrics, metric = "f1", scope = "cell")
```

## Save Outputs

```{r save-outputs}
dir.create(file.path(root, "outputs", "tables"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(file.path(root, "outputs", "figures"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

write.csv(
  metrics,
  file.path(root, "outputs", "tables", "notebook_metrics.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

saveRDS(
  list(simulation = sim, results = results, metrics = metrics),
  file.path(root, "outputs", "notebook_run.rds")
)
```
